allow: PowerShell($out = & pnpm --filter cugetreg check 2>&1; \($out -join "`n"\) | Select-String -Pattern "home/|Home.svelte" -Context 0,2 | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell($out = & pnpm --filter cugetreg check 2>&1; \($out -join "`n"\) | Select-String -Pattern "Error" -Context 1,3 | Select-Object -First 50)

PowerShell($out = & pnpm --filter @cugetreg/ui check 2>&1; $text = \($out -join "`n"\); if \($text -match "filter.svelte|selected-course.svelte"\) { $text | Select-String -Pattern "filter.svelte|selected-course.svelte" -Context 0,3 | Select-Object -First 20 } else { Write-Output "NO ERRORS in filter/selected-course" }; $text | Select-String -Pattern "svelte-check found")

PowerShell($out = & pnpm --filter @cugetreg/ui check 2>&1; $text = \($out -join "`n"\); $lines = $text -split "`n"; for \($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Length; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i] -match "selected-course.svelte" -and $lines[$i+1] -match "Error"\) { Write-Output $lines[$i]; Write-Output $lines[$i+1] } }; Write-Output "--- done scanning selected-course ---")
